name: Goat Butcher
description: Circle 7 (Violence) — industrial slaughterhouse goat. Heavy cleaver, blood-soaked, relentless.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon butcher in A-pose, stocky powerful build, blood-matted dark red fur, blunt scarred horns, wielding an enormous rusty meat cleaver in the right hand and a butcher hook on a chain in the left, wearing a blood-soaked leather butcher apron over bare chest, heavy industrial rubber boots over digitigrade goat legs, dead emotionless black eyes, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Stocky bipedal goat demon butcher, blood-matted dark red fur, meat cleaver and hook-chain, blood-soaked apron, rubber boots, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Blood-matted dark red fur, rusty cleaver blade, blood-soaked brown leather apron, heavy chain with iron hook, black rubber boots, dead black eyes
